ACHIEVEMENTS.achievement_description: Has been a member for 1 year.
Has been a member for 3 years.
Has been a member for 10+ years.
Donated a small amount to the association (up to ₱5,000 total).
Donated a medium amount to the association (up to ₱20,000 total).
Donated a large amount to the association (over ₱20,000 total).
Part of the Recoletos Educational Assistance for Deserving Students.
